instructions.primary_goal:
Add cluster-state schema and atomic state store for POL-203.

Implement the cluster-state.json schema with runtime-state fields (run_id, cluster_id, branch, children_completed, children_total, status, sealed, last_dispatch, last_result), add atomic write operations (writeStateAtomic), and implement the completed_children_meta structure for tracking finished child dispatch records with migration path from legacy current-state.json.

Branch: philmeaux/pol-201-implement-runtime-state-consolidation-and-cluster-state
steps: EMIT HEARTBEAT: Append worker-start event to telemetry with step_cursor: "start".
Create src/loop/cluster-state.ts with ClusterState interface and schema validation.
Add atomic write utilities: writeStateAtomic with temp file + rename pattern.
Update checkpoint.ts: Add completed_children_meta type and integrate with LoopState.
Add migration helper: migrateLegacyState() to convert current-state.json to cluster-state format.
Update dispatch.ts: When child completes, migrate dispatch_record from open_children_meta to completed_children_meta with status 'completed' and completed_at timestamp.
Add tests in src/loop/cluster-state.test.ts for schema validation and atomic writes.
Run validation commands: npm run build, npm test -- src/loop/cluster-state.test.ts.
Create exactly ONE git commit: [POL-203] Add cluster-state schema and atomic state store.
Update /Users/lsctech/Developer/Polaris/.taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json: move "POL-203" from open_children to completed_children, add completed_children_meta entry.
Write compact return JSON to stdout (fields: child_id, status, commit, validation, next_recommended_action).
TERMINATE SESSION IMMEDIATELY. Do not select or execute the next child.
acceptance_criteria: ClusterState interface defined with all required runtime-state fields
writeStateAtomic implements atomic temp file + rename pattern
completed_children_meta structure stores finished child dispatch records
Dispatch migration logic moves records from open_children_meta to completed_children_meta
Build succeeds with no TypeScript errors
